required_skills: Rendering pipeline architecture and implementation covering forward, deferred, and forward+ rendering strategies
Advanced lighting systems development including clustered lighting, cascaded shadow maps, and screen-space reflections (SSR)
Post-processing pipeline development including bloom, depth of field, motion blur, tone mapping, and color grading
Proficiency in C++ for rendering engine code combined with HLSL or GLSL for shader development
Global illumination techniques including SSAO, SSGI, Light Propagation Volumes (LPV), and Lumen-style dynamic GI systems
Rendering API expertise in DirectX 12, Vulkan, or Metal including resource management, render pass design, and synchronization
Render graph architecture and frame graph systems for declarative, reusable, and optimized multi-pass rendering pipelines
Anti-aliasing and image quality techniques including MSAA, FXAA, TAA, and AI-upscaling integration (DLSS, FSR)
preferred_skills: Path tracing and offline rendering pipeline development for cutscene or high-fidelity preview rendering
Signed Distance Field (SDF) rendering for soft shadows, ambient occlusion, and global illumination approximations
Volumetric rendering including fog, clouds, participating media, and atmospheric scattering simulation
Hybrid rasterization and ray tracing pipeline design balancing performance and visual quality
Skinning and morph target rendering systems for high-performance character animation pipelines
Occlusion culling systems including hierarchical Z-buffer culling, portal culling, and software rasterization
HDR rendering pipeline design and display output targeting including HDR10, Dolby Vision, and calibration
responsibilities: Architect and implement multi-pass rendering pipelines using render graph systems that efficiently schedule and execute deferred, forward, and post-processing render passes
Develop advanced lighting and shadowing systems including clustered lighting, cascaded shadow maps, contact shadows, and area light approximations for large dynamic scenes
Build and optimize a post-processing pipeline covering HDR tone mapping, color grading (LUT-based), bloom, depth of field, chromatic aberration, and motion blur
Implement global illumination solutions ranging from screen-space techniques (SSAO, SSGI) to dynamic probe-based GI and hardware-accelerated ray traced GI
Design and maintain the rendering abstraction layer over DirectX 12 and Vulkan, ensuring stable, cross-platform rendering behavior across PC and console targets
Integrate and validate AI-upscaling technologies (DLSS 3, FSR 3, XeSS) and frame generation techniques to improve performance without sacrificing visual quality
Profile and optimize the full rendering frame using GPU debugging tools (RenderDoc, Nsight, PIX), resolving stalls, pipeline bubbles, and memory bandwidth bottlenecks
Develop volumetric rendering systems for atmospheric fog, dynamic cloud layers, and participating media that integrate with the real-time lighting pipeline
Collaborate with technical artists and visual effects teams to provide robust, performant rendering hooks for particle systems, decals, and procedural VFX
Research and prototype next-generation rendering techniques from SIGGRAPH publications and GPU vendor whitepapers, evaluating production feasibility and presenting findings to the engineering team
